You are a senior full-stack SaaS engineer.

Upgrade the following modules to **enterprise-level systems**:

* WhatsApp Order Flow
* Payment System
* Support System (Tickets)
* Announcement System
* Contact Message System

This must be a **complete, scalable, professional communication + transaction system**.

---

# 1) WHATSAPP ORDER SYSTEM (Upgrade)

## User Flow

* user selects plan
* clicks "Order via WhatsApp"
* auto-generated message:

  * platform name
  * duration (minutes/hours/days)
  * price
  * user email/id

## Admin Side

* show all WhatsApp orders in dashboard
* status system:

  * pending
  * contacted
  * paid
  * completed
* allow admin notes per order
* track timestamp of order

---

# 2) PAYMENT SYSTEM (Upgrade)

## User Flow

* user selects plan
* clicks "Pay Now"
* sees payment instructions (JazzCash/EasyPaisa/Stripe)
* uploads payment proof (screenshot)

## Admin Side

* payment approval panel
* approve / reject buttons
* auto-create subscription after approval
* store payment record permanently
* prevent duplicate approvals

## Important

* payment must link to:

  * plan_id
  * duration_value
  * duration_unit

---

# 3) SUPPORT SYSTEM (Tickets)

## User Side

* create support ticket
* fields:

  * subject
  * message
  * category
* see ticket history
* see replies from admin

## Admin Side

* ticket dashboard
* reply to tickets
* change status:

  * open
  * in progress
  * resolved
* conversation-style UI (chat-like)

---

# 4) CONTACT MESSAGE SYSTEM

## User Side

* simple contact form:

  * name
  * email
  * message

## Admin Side

* inbox view
* reply system
* mark as read/unread
* delete/archive messages

---

# 5) ANNOUNCEMENT SYSTEM

## Admin Side

* create announcements:

  * title
  * description
  * type (info, update, warning)
* schedule announcements (optional)
* enable/disable announcements

## User Side

* show announcements on dashboard
* highlight important announcements
* show latest updates first

---

# 6) UI/UX REQUIREMENTS (IMPORTANT)

Make all modules:

* modern SaaS design
* clean layout
* responsive
* smooth transitions
* no clutter

Use:

* cards
* badges
* status colors
* clean tables
* modal forms

---

# 7) PERFORMANCE (CRITICAL)

System must:

* handle 1000+ concurrent users
* no slow loading
* optimized API calls
* no duplicate requests

---

# 8) SECURITY

* validate all inputs
* prevent spam submissions
* protect admin routes
* secure payment data
* no sensitive data leaks

---

# 9) NOTIFICATIONS (ADD THIS)

Add system notifications:

* new support ticket alert
* new payment alert
* new contact message alert
* new WhatsApp order alert

---

# 10) FINAL RESULT

After implementation:

* user can interact smoothly
* admin can manage everything easily
* communication system fully integrated
* payment flow secure and reliable

This must feel like a real SaaS product, not a basic website.
